name: Robust Rosettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat all ingredients together until smooth. If the mixture seems a little too thick, add milk.
2. Strain the batter.
3. Preheat oil in an electric deep fryer.
4. Heat the rosette iron in the oil.
5. When hot, lift out of the oil and drain.
6. Dip the hot iron into the batter. Do not let the mixture overflow the top of the iron.
7. Return to the oil and fry until golden brown; cool.
8. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 50.
NOTE: If you wish to make sweet rosettes, omit the pepper and add vanilla to the batter. Sprinkle rosettes with powdered sugar.
